name: beui-slide-action
title: Slide Action
author: Saurabh Chauhan
description: Requires a measured drag to the logical far edge before confirming an action.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports.
Measured inherited text direction and mapped drag constraints, progress, fill origin, logical padding, completion threshold, and arrow orientation for RTL.

modifications.change: Repointed shared imports and added direction-aware drag geometry.
modifications.reason: Install without project aliases and keep the confirmation gesture equivalent in LTR and RTL.
